base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of snow_tile_palette0 — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Snow-field tile — used in The Lost Levels / FDS Minus World variants. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Snow-field tile — used in The Lost Levels / FDS Minus World variants; not reached in vanilla SMB level flow
